Data may not add to totals due to rounding.

Total value of exports refers to the part of annual domestic export value (customs basis) that can be linked to specific entities in the Business Register each year. Annual domestic export values (customs basis) can be obtained from table 12-10-0175. For additional information and definitions related to merchandise domestic exports, refer to Canadian International Merchandise Trade (Custom Basis) (opens new window)."
Territories include: Yukon, Northwest Territories and Nunavut.
